== Notes for [[Item:Q102388|Q102388]] ==

Based on:

The Jewish Quarterly Review Vol. 31, No. 2, Oct., 1940

JOURNAL ARTICLE The Exilarchate in the Eastern Caliphate, 637-1258 Alexander D. Goode

Available at https://www.jstor.org/stable/1452602

This should be checked against earlier sources.

----
We have a profile Hananiyah haKohen (i.e. of kohanic descent) - 660-673 (approx.) who lived after him, so this does not resonate with this profile with respect to the birth date span.

PLEASE DO NOT TRY AND MERGE.

----

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000143565488995

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
